sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53318" key="kardopoglu/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρδοπογλύφος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n53318.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scooping out kneading-troughs</tr_> or other <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wooden utensils</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0433.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
